scenario.context: Station 06: set up infrastructure, provision components, and plan the rollout in a controlled way.
scenario.mission: You turn the technical concept into a repeatable installation and rollout process.

constraints: Define the sequence and fallback options clearly
Consider dependencies between infrastructure and services

customerRequest.subject: Station 06: Installation and rollout
customerRequest.body: Please prepare the installation and rollout sequence for the new area.

questions.title: Secure rollout start
questions.prompt: What is the most important thing before the actual rollout?

options.text: Check the configuration state, time window, and fallback plan
options.rationale: That keeps the rollout controllable and lower-risk.

options.text: Immediately switch all components into production at once
options.rationale: Without safeguards, the project risk rises sharply.

options.text: Postpone the documentation until later on purpose
options.rationale: That makes traceability and handover harder.

feedback.correct: Correct: A controlled start is crucial for the rollout.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Before the rollout, safeguards and the fallback path must be in place.

questions.title: Structure provisioning
questions.prompt: Put the sequence for a clean provisioning into order.
items: Provide the core infrastructure and cabling paths
Set up server services and central roles
Carry out functional tests and partial acceptances
Hand the state over to operations and support
correctOrder: Provide the core infrastructure and cabling paths
Set up server services and central roles
Carry out functional tests and partial acceptances
Hand the state over to operations and support

feedback.correct: Correct: Provisioning follows a logical technical sequence.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please structure infrastructure, components, services, and handover clearly.

questions.title: Secure configuration quality
questions.prompt: Which points help with a stable configuration practice? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Document VLAN, port, and policy rules cleanly
Define responsibilities and approvals for each change

options.rationale: Significantly increases the risk of incidents.

options.text: Store configuration states in a versionable way
Mention changes only verbally in the team
options.rationale: That is not enough for controlled operations.

feedback.correct: Correct: Good configuration practice needs traceability and control.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: Please pay more attention to versioning, approvals, and documentation.

questions.title: Formulate a rollout note
questions.prompt: Describe in 4-6 sentences how you would document a rollout section so operations and support can take over safely afterward.
questions.expectedOutline: Documentation approach for traceable configuration, approval, and open items.

feedback.correct: Correct: The rollout documentation is described in a handover-ready way.
feedback.wrong: Please highlight the configuration state, approval, and open items more clearly.

questions.title: Calculate PoE load
questions.prompt: Four access points require 18 W of PoE power each. What is the total PoE load in watts?

feedback.wrong: Please multiply the number of access points and the power per device correctly.
